Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family businessģthey're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: David has been married to Linda for 3 years and has been living in his car for 2Į of them! He claims that her children won't allow him in the house and in order to save his marriage, he camps out in his car parked next to their home.
Video.title: I Live In A Car!

Video.summary: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.
Video.title: You Better Hope You Passed

Video.summary: Alec called the show to say that his girlfriend Tori is being physically and mentally abusive. He says he needs Steve to help him give her a wakeup call and start showing him the respect that he deserves.
Video.title: My Girlfriend Beats Me

Video.summary: Lorri is here because she believes that her grandson is being abused by his mother Alyssa and her ex-boyfriend Josh. She's here to find out the truth about whether or not they are really guilty of this abuse.
Video.title: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Video.title: My Wife Left Me For My Father

Video.summary: Can Kim get rid of her husbandÆs meddling ex-lover?
Video.title: Attack of the Ex-Lovers

Video.summary: Brittany's got a bone to pick with Brandi, a stripper that keeps getting in the way of her happiness. Then Jeremy finally found a girl just like dear old mom, but too bad mom is a stripper, and hence girlfriend Jessica is too.
Video.title: Stripper Tales

Video.summary: DavidÆs love triangle is about to fall apart. Barb confronts Tony about his lingering ex, but she blames Barb.
Video.title: I Have Too Many Lovers!

Video.summary: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.
Video.title: Scorned Lovers Fight Back

Video.summary: Shawna and her cousin, Amy, were friends until Amy slept with Shawna's man, Jeremy. Next Danny's girlfriend, Sylvia, has a husband who's gay.
Video.title: Your Ex Is A Nightmare!

Video.summary: Chris is here today to tell his girlfriend, Chrissy, about his sexual fetish. Next we meet Mistress Tara, the dominatrix who caters to Chris' fantasy. We'll watch him pretend to be a dog.
Video.title: My Day As A Dog!

Video.summary: Tyson is shocked to discover that Deja is a man and Kenny finds out that Sabrina was born a man.
Video.title: Honey, I'm Really A Guy

Video.summary: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!
Video.title: Ex-lovers Return!

Video.summary: Mehren says everything would be just great with her boyfriend, John, if only his wife would leave them alone! Next Greg is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend, Yolanda!
Video.title: I Admit ... I'm Cheating

Video.summary: JohnnyÆs relationship is at deathÆs door because he canÆt stop cheating. See more sexy Halloween hijinks!
Video.title: Trick or Cheaters?

Video.summary: T-Jay says it is time to share his deep, dark secret with the woman he has been seeing; Natasha wants to marry her baby's father, but he is miserable in the relationship; Sasha's boyfriend betrayed her trust.
Video.title: One Night Stands Reunited

Video.summary: Steven and Tekla say their daughter-in-law Jamie is their retirement fund. Then, Patricia will reveal to her mom who introduced her to hooking!
Video.title: I'm Pimping My Daughter

Video.summary: Demetrius cheated on Aleesha with her sister Keshia and also a stripper named Natalie. Then, Kahari's here to reveal to his girlfriend Jasmine that not only is he bi-sexual, but he's also been cheating on he with a transsexual named.
Video.title: Transtastic Confessions

Video.summary: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her abusive boyfriend Michael of 11 months. Michael says Betty abuses him, too, but Scott and Dawn donÆt believe him. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
Video.title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Video.summary: StephanieÆs drug addiction led her to severely neglect and abuse their children. As ScottÆs fiancķe Amy has stepped in as a mother and Stephanie fails multiple drug tests, he doesnÆt want her near the children, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!
Video.title: Mommy Hurt Me

Video.summary: Angela and James have separated after many years of marriage and she believes that James' new girlfriend has molested her daughters. Now she is demanding a lie detector test! Plus, Stevisha's husband Ira thinks she's cheating.
Video.title: Bitter Ex or Concerned Mother?

Video.summary: Angel claims that her father Ronald abused her sexually, forced her to do drugs and even got her addicted to crack when she was 18. His other daughter Tracy also claims heÆs tried to abuse her several times, but Ronald says heÆs innocent!
Video.title: Devil Dad

Video.summary: With two small children at home, Anna's severe drug addiction has led her to prostituting to feed her habit. Her mother, who's had to raise the children, is terrified for her daughter's life.
Video.title: Steve Save My Daughter

Video.summary: A teenage boy abuses his mom, often getting his younger brother involved. He says that he got the idea when he'd witnessed one of his mother's boyfriends pull a knife on her.
Video.title: We Beat Up Our Mom

Video.summary: Today on Steve Wilkos, Steven is desperate to find out who is the real father of his 3 year old son. He found out that his ex, Shannon, was intimate with 3 of his best friends when she got pregnant.
Video.title: Angry Dad Demands DNA

Video.summary: Lorie gave birth to twin boys, and while she initially thought boyfriend Carlos was the father, she would later believe it was actually Warren, a claim he strongly denies. Warren wants Lorie to stop harassing him about being the father.
Video.title: I Hope I'm Not The Father
